  "findings": [
    "Encroachment of crane boom/load within the minimum clearance distance of active overhead power lines without proper de-energization, shielding, or dedicated spotter protocols."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Signal the operator to stop all crane movements immediately.",
    "Verify the voltage of the power lines to establish the exact boundary of the prohibited zone per OSHA Table A.",
    "Implement a dedicated spotter, warning transmitters, or physical barriers if work must continue near the boundary.",
    "Request utility company to de-energize and ground the lines if clearance cannot be maintained."
  ],
  "rationale": "Operating a crane near active overhead power lines without verifying clearance distances and implementing mandatory OSHA safety measures poses an immediate, critical electrocution hazard. The operation must be halted immediately until compliance with OSHA 1926.1408 is fully established.",

    "OSHA 1926.1408",
    "OSHA 1926.1411"
  ]
}
